dsl_rule.translation_notes: Translated 'long bottom tail' as lower_wick > body. Candle body in upper end of range expressed as close >= pivot (price position in upper half). Green body preferred but red acceptable is captured by body > 0 condition (body positive for green, pattern valid regardless). Rejection of lower prices captured by lower tail being longer than body. Exit condition AUTHOR_SILENT converted to reasonable reversal: close crossing below sma_20 indicates trend failure.

backtest_rule.reason: Translated 'long bottom tail' as lower_wick > body. Candle body in upper end of range expressed as close >= pivot (price position in upper half). Green body preferred but red acceptable is captured by body > 0 condition (body positive for green, pattern valid regardless). Rejection of lower prices captured by lower tail being longer than body. Exit condition AUTHOR_SILENT converted to reasonable reversal: close crossing below sma_20 indicates trend failure.

source_rule_text: Buy when a candle has a long bottom tail with a green body, or even a red body if the lower tail is long and rejects lower prices, as this is super bullish.
